calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Set For Trial On Dec-04-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Continued To Dec-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 11:40 a.m.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo as assigned by the Presiding Judge Dept. 206.

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff/Appellant, Dan Zielgler appears in Propria Persona.
Defendants/Respondents, Miri Ben-Shalom and Robert Kurshan appears in Propria Persona.

Parties are sworn and direct testify on their own behalf.
The Court hears argument and receives evidence in support.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. No exhibit retained by the Court.

Dept. 306. Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
